title: Gonebutnotforgotten INFINITY
description: ARG-Type Horror mod, which adds several new dimensions!
body: Are you ready for a new ARG-Horror Mod? Just a little reminder! If you enjoy what I create, you can support me at [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/minemats44) _(This Mod was inspired by wonderland.jar, but I did not copy any Assets, Lore or Dimensions from the mod.)_ __Heavy thanks to OliBerber for many textures and ideas! Youtube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@OliBerber__ This mod adds (currently 52) new Dimensions, and with them new entities and other stuff to your world. Every Dimension either has an important aspect of horror, or a major phobia centered around it. Here is some important information about the mod: 1. The purple Blocks (or the entity) lead you into a random dimension, or maybe back to the overworld. 2. The exits generate randomly as a structure. Look out for bright lights. 3. In the dark dimension, fight off the eyes with a flashlight. the flashlight can be crafted. The recipe is unlocked by a battery, found in chests. 4. You are safe at the surface of the infinite ocean. 5. Lore books can be hidden in many dimensions. 6. In Multiplayer, every Player in an 64-Block radius will be teleported if a Player enters a dimension. 7. Use /unstuck if softlocked.
